data.body: Investigation: The contract doc and code are already aligned. Line 27 of worktree-tracking-comment.md reads 'Posted by harvest-worktree.sh in its cleanup trap after the merge attempt (success or failure).' This matches harvest-worktree.sh _harvest_cleanup() at lines 82-103 which posts in the ERR/EXIT trap with outcome=merged (exit 0) or outcome=discarded (non-zero). Both were introduced together in commit 19523fb4. The ticket description quotes an earlier draft ('before merge back to the session branch') that never made it into the committed doc. No code or doc change needed — leaving ticket open per Rule #14 (no autonomous close without a code change). Recommend user close as invalid / already-resolved.
